results.title: Corrie star's heartbreaking admission following cancer battle: 'Time I won't get back'
results.description: The star was diagnosed with breast cancer just months after the birth of her son.

results.title: Bengaluru Man's Message To Specially-Abled Zomato Delivery Agent Touches Hearts Online (WATCH VIRAL VIDEO)
results.description: A viral video from Bengaluru captures a man's heartwarming interaction with a specially-abled Zomato delivery person. The man, Sai Harsha, praised the rider's inspiring work and offered a small tip, a gesture that has since been widely appreciated online for its show of respect and gratitude.

results.title: The Power of the First Frame: How Grand Opening Shots Shape Cinema
results.description: This article explores how the opening shot of a film serves as a cornerstone for storytelling, examining iconic examples from the twentieth century that demonstrate the lasting impact of visual introductions on audience expectations and narrative depth
